records.ety: [From John Loudon McAdam, who introduced the process into Great Britain in 1816.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Macadamized (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Macadamizing.]

defs: To cover, as a road, or street, parking lot, playground, or other flat area, with macadam, so as to form a smooth, hard, convex surface.
